title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Sabo, Vivi, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Law, Unknown person #12 as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Grand Round Table in the Council Chamber

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: It seems that King Cobra...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...and King Wapol are not yet present.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just received word that the two of them will not be attending and that we are to proceed without them.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Perhaps King cobra's impassioned speech drained him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WA HA HA HA HA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe he considers his job done, now that the dissolution of the warlords has been approved.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us move to the remaining matters on the agenda.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now then, concerning the coalition of the four Northern Nations calling for indepen- dance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Shirahoshi, the conference is almost over!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go wait at the Red Port, we won't have to deal with the celestial dances there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: _You Okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was hoping to say goodbye to Princess Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I wonder where she went...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's the big idea?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You'd better unite me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: whose orders are you follow- ing?!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: A GUEST ROOM IN PANGAEA CASTLE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll tell the whole world about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, easy there. You're being too forward.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gotta play your cards closer to the vest if you want a shot at being free, y"know...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're one feisty chick...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid no one's going to help you, princess.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Once your disappearance is made known...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you'll probably live the rest of your life like a pet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is Shirahoshi all right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously?! Now's not the time to be worried about others, Li'l missy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We received word that more trouble broke out around her earlier, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She apparently came out of the ordeal unscathed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank goodness...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The punks who ended up assaulting the celestial dragon that was trying to kidnap the mermaid Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're members of the straw hat fleet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Boldly proclaimed their victory, giving their names and everything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The guests in the Courtyard were stunned!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Meanwhile at the home of the gods...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fluitora's actions helped the revolutionary army free the slaves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that obviously pissed ryokugyu off, so they went at it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHAT'S THE DEAL WITH THIS YEAR'S REVERIE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like a pet? Gimme a break... looks like I'm gonna have to do something about this...

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
